sigWerErrors.reason: The only difference is the missing accent on 'más'. In Spanish, 'más' (with accent) means 'more', while 'mas' (without accent) means 'but', but in spoken language and context, this is almost always interpreted as 'más'. The meaning of the sentence is not changed in this context.
